name: InterfaceRecord
summary: Record that declares a plugin implements a particular interface or behaviour.

properties.name: DeveloperId
properties.summary: The 4 character ADN developer code or a GUID. The combination of this and Name is used to form Id that identifies which interface is being supported.

properties.name: DisplayName
properties.summary: Optional additional information about the interface implementation

properties.name: Id
properties.summary: The full identifier of the interface being supported. This is formed as Name.DeveloperId

properties.name: Name
properties.summary: The name of the Inteface. The combination of this and DeveloperId is used to form Id that identifies which interface is being supported.

properties.name: UserData
properties.summary: Optional additional information about the interface implementation
